name: Deutsche Telekom
lede: Driving force behind the European Edge Continuum and an IPCEI-CIS lead project.
facts: Co-initiator of the first federated European edge cloud, shown live at MWC 2026 with Orange, Telefonica, TIM and Vodafone.
Leads a direct IPCEI-CIS project and is engaged in the planned IPCEI-AI.
Runs the Open Telekom Cloud via T-Systems and targets a central role in Europe's industrial AI cloud.
